choices.text: PV (planned value) + EV (earned value, % done × budget) + AC (actual cost). CPI = EV/AC: <1 over budget. SPI = EV/PV: <1 behind schedule. Standard tracking tool for cost + schedule performance.

questions.explanation: EVM: CPI + SPI track project health.

choices.text: Written PCO (Pending Change Order) → pricing (cost-plus markup or unit price) → schedule impact assessment → signed by all parties → executed. Verbal change orders not enforceable; risk of dispute.
